Colin Smith

Position: Forward

6-8, 215lb (203cm, 97kg)

Hometown: Dallas, TX

High School: St. Mark's (TX); AZ Compass Prep (AZ)

Schools: Vanderbilt (Men) and UC Santa Barbara (Men)
